title: Croissant ML metadata for the open dataset
context: Croissant ML is an emerging standard for machine-readable dataset metadata that improves discoverability and interoperability for ML/data-science use cases, complementing the schema.org/Dataset metadata from task 010. Adding Croissant metadata makes the screening-coverage-trends dataset easier to find and use in data-science tooling. This is a backlog/future item pending a decision on whether to adopt now or defer. It is low risk as it is pure metadata with no impact on the dataset content, provenance, or patient-facing content.
objective: Add Croissant ML metadata to the open cancer-screening-coverage trend dataset, describing its structure, fields, and distributions in a machine-readable format compatible with Croissant ML tooling. The metadata must accurately reflect the canonical schema and preserve provenance and license information.
acceptanceCriteria: Croissant ML metadata file produced conforming to the Croissant ML specification; describes the dataset's fields (matching the canonical trend-series schema from task 004), data distributions, and record structure
Metadata accurately records the dataset's license (CC-BY-4.0), publisher, and provenance references consistent with the schema.org/Dataset metadata from task 010
Croissant metadata does not introduce any new data claims, figures, or interpretations beyond what appears in the canonical dataset; it is purely descriptive metadata
Croissant metadata passes validation using available Croissant ML tooling or schema validator
Metadata is committed to the repo alongside the dataset and referenced from the data dictionary (task 010)
Maintainer and license reviewer sign-off recorded before merge
output: A merged PR adding a Croissant ML metadata file for the open cancer-screening-coverage trend dataset: Croissant-valid, consistent with the canonical schema and existing schema.org/Dataset metadata, license and provenance preserved; Maintainer and license reviewer sign-offs recorded.
